description: A game's official community forum is hit by a large number of spam posts from newly created accounts.

nodes.task_description: Identify the spam posts and the accounts that created them.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies a pattern of posts with malicious links from accounts created within the last hour.

nodes.task_description: Run a script to bulk-delete all posts and ban all accounts originating from the spammer's IP block.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully cleans the forum and bans the spam accounts.

nodes.task_description: Temporarily enable stricter posting requirements for new accounts to prevent a recurrence.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent updates the forum settings to require email verification for new posters.
